creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri May 10 06:41:30 2013
New Revision: 317764
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317764

Log:
  - Update to 0.2.1
  
  PR:		177930
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/net/serveez/Makefile
  head/net/serveez/distinfo

Modified: head/net/serveez/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/serveez/Makefile	Fri May 10 06:40:09 2013	(r317763)
+++ head/net/serveez/Makefile	Fri May 10 06:41:30 2013	(r317764)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	serveez
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	net devel
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 
@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ post-patch:
 		's| -release .*||' ${WRKSRC}/src/libserveez/Makefile.in
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		'/date -r/s|^|#|' ${WRKSRC}/src/irc-server/Makefile.in
-	@${ECHO_CMD} 'static char created[] = "2013-01-29 15:17 UTC";' \
+	@${ECHO_CMD} 'static char created[] = "2013-03-27 07:52 UTC";' \
 		> ${WRKSRC}/src/irc-server/timestamp.c
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/serveez/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/serveez/distinfo	Fri May 10 06:40:09 2013	(r317763)
+++ head/net/serveez/distinfo	Fri May 10 06:41:30 2013	(r317764)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (serveez-0.2.0.tar.xz) = 812360
+SHA256 (serveez-0.2.1.tar.xz) = a260028f4342620c4531c62c3233b9f66d5ae91d501fbbb6ff675a7087b5a0f3
+SIZE (serveez-0.2.1.tar.xz) = 816464
